ogTitle: Templestowe Lower vs Tenby Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Templestowe Lower and Tenby Point.
heading: Templestowe Lower vs Tenby Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Templestowe Lower, Victoria and Tenby Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Templestowe Lower has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tenby Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Templestowe Lower or Tenby Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Templestowe Lower has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Tenby Point scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Templestowe Lower scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Tenby Point scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Templestowe Lower or Tenby Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Templestowe Lower has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
